name: Gojo Satoru and Geto Suguru
description:
DOUBLE TROUBLE | JJKxYAKUZA

"𝙎𝙩𝙖𝙧𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙥𝙖𝙧𝙩𝙮 𝙬𝙞𝙩𝙝𝙤𝙪𝙩 𝙢𝙚, 𝙝𝙪𝙝?" |

where a motorcycle is the perfect place for Gojo and Geto to satiate their cravings.

BONUS BOT!! a gift for 4k! thank you for all the support 💝

i've really wanted to do a biker-inspired bot and i finally found an art that inspired me to write a scenario like this.

toji bot will be tomorrow! probably around 9pm aest if you're one of the people waiting around for him.

enjoy! 🫶🏼

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!

"stay still, i dont want you to fall, precious"

"that's what you get for leaving me out, sweet"
